overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with pink hair riding an elevated train through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The train winds past towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, briefly revealing the train interior with other passengers before returning to the panoramic city view.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from an elevated train platform moving past industrial and geometric concrete buildings at night. The scene is lit by ambient neon light, and at around 11 seconds, a large 'Real Water' billboard comes into view on the right. The character with pink hair stands looking out at the passing urban landscape.

segments.scene_description: The train continues along the elevated track as the environment opens up to reveal panoramic views of the city below. The track curves through the urban canyon, passing a teal-lit building and residential high-rises. The 'Real Water' billboard moves from mid-distance to near view before exiting the frame.

segments.scene_description: The train moves through a narrower section of the city with buildings close to the track. A prominent red-striped building with a vertical neon light dominates the right side. The camera begins to turn at the end of the segment, indicating a transition toward the train interior.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to reveal the interior of the train car, showing other passengers seated and standing. The space is lit by artificial ceiling lights, with metal benches and hand rails visible. Two notable passengers are seen - one seated with crossed arms and another standing holding the overhead rail.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to the exterior, revealing a sweeping view of the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape at night. The train continues along the elevated track past towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and countless illuminated windows, concluding the journey through the futuristic downtown.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated train journey through a dense industrial district into a panoramic view of a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins by gliding past geometric concrete buildings and a large Real Water billboard, with a pink-haired character gazing out at the ambient neon glow. As the track curves, the environment opens into an urban canyon of teal-lit high-rises before narrowing again to pass a prominent red-striped building with vertical neon lights. The camera then pivots inward to reveal the train's interior, capturing passengers seated on metal benches under artificial ceiling lights, before turning back toward the exterior. Finally, the view expands into a sweeping vista of the downtown cityscape, moving past towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements under the night sky.
